zh.lifeSummary: Dorothy於大約1619年出生在英國。她於1641年之前與John Thompson結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1666年3月29日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Dorothy于大约1619年出生在英国。她于1641年之前与John Thompson结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1666年3月29日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂。

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Dorothy was born about 1619, in England. She married John Thompson before 1641. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died before 29 March 1666, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy(은)는 대략 1619년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1641년 이전 John Thompson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1666년 3월 29일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Dorothy nasceu aproximadamente 1619, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John Thompson antes 1641. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 29 de março de 1666, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Dorothy родилась около 1619 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Thompson перед 1641 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла перед 29 марта 1666 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Dorothy nació aproximadamente 1619, en Inglaterra. Se casó con John Thompson antes de 1641. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió antes de 29 de marzo de 1666, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
